titleStmt.title: SII 39.18: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 18. (A.R. No. 18 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHU. KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA-6TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records the sale of land by the ūrār of the village Ilañjēripaṟṟu near Poyyil in Kīḻkuṇḍāru, a sub-division of Kēralaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu, to Māṇikkaṉ Saṉṉaṉ alias Saṇḍamāruḍa-vayirākkirār, an Āṇḍār of Tiruchchaṉṉavānam, a sub-division in Tiruppumaṇḍapura after deducting all the taxes like silvari, peruvari veṭṭimuṭṭāval, for the purpose of guarding maṇḍapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṟkittikku mel śrī komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekara tevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 6vatu taimātattu 2 10 3- § nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭuk kīḻkuṇṭāṟṟup poyyilippāl Illañceri
Ūrāyamainta Ūrom tiruttiyūr muṭṭattu tiruccaṉṉavaṉattu Āṇṭārkaḷil māṇikkaṉ caṉṉaṉāṉa caṇṭamā
tu vaiyirākiyāṟku Iṟaiyilivilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Illañ cerippaṟṟu kuruntaṅkuṭi vayalil
Ivar Iṟuttu Aṉupavittu viḷāñ ceyāṉa piḷḷaivayakkal Uṭaiyār caṉṉavaṉa muṭaiyanā
yaṉāṟkut tiruppūmaṇṭappuṟamā Iṟai kaḻittu Imaṇṭapattukku veṇṭun tevaikku kaṭamaiyantarā
yam Iṟuppataṟku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟ kellai teṟkoṭiya vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai
cātāṉ pociya kkum melpāṟ kellai Aḻivañcātāṉ tampikku nallāṉ koṟṟaṉ vayakkal kiḻ
varampukku kiḻakkum va kāṭiya vākkālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉ kellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nilamum In
nilattil meṉokkiya mara yakiṇaṟum maṟṟum meppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷukku viṟṟu
vilaipporuḷāvaṇak kaḷatte kā pivirānti piramātarāyar vacaṅkuṭupiccu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Innilattukku vi
lai Ōlaiyum poruṭ cilavolaiyumāvatākavum Itu vallatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟuti poruḷ celavolai kāṇavuṅ kāṭṭavuṅ
kaṭavatallavākavum Innilattil kaṭamaiyantarāyam Innāyaṉār tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku Irukkumiṭattu patinaṟucāṇ kolāl
ru mā nilattukku nellum Antarāyam nāṟpatu pu
Itukku vanta cilvari peruvari veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ maṟṟum meppeṟpaṭṭaṉavuntavintu Ūṟap
ppaṭik ku kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷa viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutte
ṉamañca Ūroma Ippaṭikku Aivaṉ piḷḷāṉ taṟkuṟi
Ippaṭi ruvemaṉ taṟkuṟiyu ṭu Ivai vāricatakaṉ Eḻu
vūr kaṇakku villuṭaiyaṉṉai
Eṭutta kaiyaḻakiyāṉeḻuttu Itu māheśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 39.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
